Container.Name: filex
Container.Overview:
filex is a fast, self-hosted file manager: browse, upload, preview, share and edit files across local folders, S3/MinIO, SFTP, WebDAV and FTP. Public share links with PIN and expiry, file-drop upload links, full-text search, image/video/PDF thumbnails, trash and versioning, role-based access control, TOTP 2FA, optional SSO (OIDC/LDAP) and an AI/MCP API for agents.
First start: an admin account (admin@local) is created and its password is printed ONCE in the container log (also saved to /data/.first-run.txt) — unless you preset Admin Email + Admin Password below. Sign in at /admin.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Database (SQLite), search index, thumbnail cache and the one-time first-run admin secret

Config.Name: Files
Config.Description: The share/folder filex manages — seeded as the default local storage on first boot (e.g. /mnt/user/files). Add more storages later in the admin UI.

Config.Name: Public URL
Config.Description: The URL users open in the browser, e.g. http://TOWER:5212 or your reverse-proxy https://files.example.com — share links and SSO redirects are built from it

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Optional: preset the first admin account. Leave empty for admin@local.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional: preset the first admin password. Leave empty for a random password printed once in the container log.

Config.Name: Default Storage Driver
Config.Description: Storage seeded on first boot. Keep 'local' for the Files path above; set empty to seed nothing (configure storages in the admin UI instead).

Config.Name: Default Storage Path
Config.Description: Container path of the seeded local storage — matches the Files mapping above.
